title: paeonia triternata
intro: Paeonia triternata, also known as White Peony or Bao He, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Paeonia, native to the mountainous regions of China. It is considered an adaptogenic herb, used to balance and stabilize the body's response to stress, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia triternata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Paeonia triternata is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its adaptogenic and medicinal effects.
